Bus Timings

Quick Guide to Route 3 in Sharjah: Rolla to Safari Mall

October 10, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Route 3 is a vital bus route in Sharjah, connecting the bustling Rolla area to the popular Safari Mall. This route is essential for daily commuters and shoppers, providing a convenient and affordable way to navigate between these key locations. With frequent services and a range of accessible stops, it plays a crucial role in the city’s public transport network.

Route Overview

The journey begins at Rolla Terminal and ends at Safari Mall Terminal. Key stops along Route 3 include:

  1. Al Jubail Terminal

  2. Central Souq

  3. King Faisal Street

  4. Jamal Abdul Naser Street

  5. Al Khan Street

  6. Second Industrial Street

  7. Maliha Road

  8. Muweilah Terminal

Operational Details

Bus Timings:

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Monday to Friday

Al Rolla Terminal

From To From To Headway
Rolla Terminal Safari Mall Terminal 06:20 09:00 20
09:30 15:30 40    
16:00 19:40 20    
20:10 21:30 40    
Safari Mall Terminal Rolla Terminal 06:30 09:10 20
09:50 15:50 40    
16:10 19:50 20    
20:30 21:10 40    

Saturday and Sunday

Safari Mall Terminal

From To From To Headway
Rolla Terminal Safari Mall Terminal 06:30 15:45 15
16:00 19:50 10    
20:00 22:00 15    
Safari Mall Terminal Rolla Terminal 06:45 16:45 15
17:00 19:50 10    
20:00 22:15 15    

Ticket Pricing:

  • Cash Ticket: AED 8.00

  • Sayer Ticket: AED 6.00

Route 3 offers a convenient and cost-effective solution for traveling between Rolla and Safari Mall. Whether you’re commuting to work or heading out for a shopping trip, this route ensures easy access to key areas in Sharjah. For a seamless travel experience, consider using Route 3 for your daily and recreational needs. If you’re interested in exploring more options for getting around the city, check out the Full Sharjah Bus Routes for a comprehensive guide to all available routes and services.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 10, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
